summary: Tested P0/P1/P2/P2b bug fixes on /dine page and admin panel. All 3 critical fixes verified working. P0: images loading (42/42 visible, 0 hidden). P1: AI image generation persists in admin. P2: Dimension cards interactive with product modal showing Add to Cart. P2b: Mira Picks horizontal scroll visible with 16 cards loading all images.

minor.issue: Login rate limit (3/day) was exhausted during testing - multiple Playwright test runs each consumed 1 daily login. 401 returns after limit hit. NOT a code bug - test environment constraint.

integration_issues.issue: MiraPicksSection cards have cursor:pointer and hover effects but NO onClick handler. Clicking a Mira Pick card does nothing. Cards appear interactive but don't open product detail modal. Consider adding onClick to open ProductDetailModal for each pick card.

issues: Image Status badge shows 'incomplete (0 images)' even when Primary Image URL has a valid cloudinary URL. Badge may not be tracking the primary image URL field correctly.

test_results.P0_image_regression: PASS - resolvePickImage and resolveEntityImage both fixed to only check url.startsWith('http'). 42/42 images on /dine page load including static.prod-images.emergentagent.com (19 URLs) and cloudinary (17 URLs). DimExpanded: 11/11 products load, all images visible.
test_results.P1_admin_ai_image_persistence: PASS - handleGenerateAIImage uses single setProduct() call. After clicking Generate AI: button shows 'Generating...' spinner, image URL updates in input field, persists after 3+ seconds with no disappearance.
test_results.P2_dimension_cards_interactive: PASS - 5 dimension cards found (dine-dim-meals, treats, supplements, frozen, homemade). Clicking 'Daily Meals' opens DimExpanded with 11 products (SharedProductCard). Clicking 'View Details' on product card opens ProductDetailModal with 'Add to Cart' button. Mira stats: 11 safe, 1 filtered, 2 match Mojo's loves.
test_results.P2b_mira_picks_section: PARTIAL PASS - 16 pick cards shown in horizontal scroll (mix of PRODUCT/SERVICE). All 16 images load successfully. Cards have hover effects/cursor:pointer BUT no onClick handler. Cards show score bars and descriptions. Cards are NOT interactive (no modal opens on click).
test_results.general_dine_page: PASS - /dine loads correctly for dipali@clubconcierge.in. Shows 'Food & Nourishment for Mojo', Allergy: Chicken, Loves: Salmon, Mira quote, category strip, Eat & Nourish/Dine Out tabs.

action_items: P2b MEDIUM: Add onClick handler to MiraPicksSection pick cards in DineSoulPage.jsx (~line 906). Should open ProductDetailModal for the pick's product/service when clicked. Currently cards have cursor:pointer + hover but no click functionality.

Minor: Admin Media tab 'Image Status: incomplete (0 images)' badge doesn't reflect the Primary Image URL field value - may need to read from product.image/image_url fields in addition to product.images array.
critical_code_review_comments: DineSoulPage.jsx MiraPicksSection (lines 898-943): Cards have cursor:pointer + onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave hover handlers but NO onClick. A user clicking a pick card expecting to see details/add to cart gets no response - UX gap. Fix: add onClick={() => setSelectedPick(pick)} + render ProductDetailModal when selectedPick is set.

ProductBoxEditor.jsx handleGenerateAIImage (lines 184-225): FIXED correctly - now uses single setProduct() call. Previous issue with 4 separate updateField calls causing React batching was root cause of P1 bug.

DineSoulPage.jsx resolvePickImage + DineContentModal.jsx resolveEntityImage: FIXED correctly - now just url.startsWith('http') without static.prod-images filter. This allows valid browser-accessible image URLs to be displayed.

success_rate.backend: 89% (8/9 tests passed, 1 failed due to test environment rate limiting)
success_rate.frontend: 90% (P0/P1/P2 fully verified, P2b cards visible but not interactive)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 image fix verified (both static.prod-images and cloudinary URLs load in browser). P1 admin AI generation fix verified (single setProduct call persists image URL). P2 DimExpanded verified with SharedProductCard + Add to Cart modal. P2b Mira Picks 16 cards visible but MISSING onClick handlers for interactivity. Login daily rate limit exhausted for dipali@clubconcierge.in during this session. Backend test: 8/9 pass (1 fail = rate limit on login endpoint not a bug). Key remaining issue: MiraPicksSection cards need onClick handlers to open ProductDetailModal.
mocked_apis: MOCK - MOCK_SPOTS restaurant data on /dine Dine Out tab is hardcoded, not from Google Places API
